title: What I do
summary: description: Ingest a new file from raw/ into the wiki knowledge layers. Use when the athlete points you at a new file they have added to raw/ (papers, race captures, GPX, scans). Encodes the full 7-step read→classify→load→draft→propose→wait→apply workflow including layer boundary rules and wiki target path mapping.

claims.text: description: Ingest a new file from raw/ into the wiki knowledge layers.
Use when the athlete points you at a new file they have added to raw/ (papers, race captures, GPX, scans).
Encodes the full 7-step read→classify→load→draft→propose→wait→apply workflow including layer boundary rules and wiki target path mapping.
## What I do Guide the full ingestion of a new raw/ source document into the appropriate wiki layer, with correct boundary classification, propose/confirm flow, and audit logging.
